title: T-048 — Scheduler Settings screen
prompt:
# T-048 — Scheduler Settings screen

PRD: `docs/prd/07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md` §17.1 PLE-005, Appendix B feature flags.
UX/prototype refs are listed in `pipeline_inputs.scope_files`.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Create a scheduler-specific settings surface for operational defaults and alerts.

## Implementation contract
Persist only user-editable config fields to T-008 schema; read flags/entitlements from Settings; use i18n keys for all labels.

ACP shape reminder: keep this task as one atomic implementation. Do not add ACP-owned fields. Keep local dependencies in `dependencies`; cross-module contracts in `cross_module_dependencies` are blockers/inputs, not ACP local task IDs.

pipeline_inputs.description: Implement /scheduler/settings cards for default run parameters, alerts, solver integration read-only state, premium flags.
pipeline_inputs.details: Matches pext_settings_screen. Cards 1-2 persist to scheduler_config. Solver URL/env card is admin/read-only in production. 14d and P2 capabilities are feature-gated.

cross_module_dependencies.contract: Feature flags, audit log and tenant subscription/entitlement data.

acceptance_criteria: Given /scheduler/settings renders, then 4-card layout matches pext_settings_screen parity.
Given Planner edits default horizon/alerts, then scheduler_config persists and audit log captures before/after JSON.
Given scheduler.horizon_14d.enabled=false, then 14-day option is disabled with explanatory tooltip.

Given the UI task is closed, when CLOSEOUT is recorded, then it includes Playwright trace artifacts plus screenshots/artifacts for prototype parity and error/empty/blocked states per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
test_strategy: RED action tests for validation/audit; RTL card layout snapshot.
Run pnpm --filter web test scheduler/SchedulerSettingsScreen settings-actions.
For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.
risk_red_lines: Do not make env-bound solver URL editable in production.
Do not enable P2 flags without Settings feature flag.
Do not skip audit log for config changes.
ui_closeout_evidence: Desktop screenshot/artifact of the implemented surface compared 1:1 to prototype `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/other-screens.jsx:79-133` (structural, visual, and interaction parity).
Playwright trace artifact for the primary happy path and at least one error/blocked/permission-denied path.
Axe (or equivalent) accessibility result, or a documented blocker with rationale.
List of intentional deviations from the prototype/UX with reason (e.g. P2 gating, RBAC hide).
Reference parity expectations in `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` and translation notes in `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-planning-ext.md`.
